name: game-dev
description: Designs and reviews game mechanics, game feel, camera/navigation, UX/FTUE, accessibility, and code architecture for Godot 4, Unity 6, and Unreal 5. Every rule cites the source it came from — Schell, Sylvester, Swink, Nystrom, Hodent, Nesky's 50 Camera Mistakes, and the Game Accessibility Guidelines. Use /game-review for a scoped diff review (mechanics + feel + camera + UX + a11y + architecture) that plays a runnable build before grading feel/UX and labels findings reviewed-live vs static-only, and /game-mechanic for a guided mechanic-design session that outputs an implementable brief. Sonnet-pinned game-design-expert subagent handles all dispatches; nothing is auto-applied.
